description_long: This is a multi-story apartment building with a pale yellow and white facade, featuring ornate architectural details and a prominent domed tower at one corner. The front of the building is adorned with symmetrically arranged windows, decorative moldings, and a small gable above the central upper window. The roof is steep and dark, with dormer windows and a spire topping the dome. The ground floor includes large window openings, likely for commercial or communal use, and the upper floors are residential. The sides and rear of the building are simpler, with fewer windows and less ornamentation. The overall design suggests a historic European architectural influence, possibly late 19th or early 20th century.
description: A historic, multi-story apartment building with a domed corner tower, ornate facade, and symmetrical windows. The structure features pale yellow and white exteriors with decorative details and a steep dark roof.
description_view_0: The front and corner of the building are visible, showcasing the domed tower, ornate windows, and decorative facade details.
description_view_1: The side of the building is shown, with minimal windows and a plain wall, highlighting the depth and rear extension.
description_view_2: The rear and another side of the building are visible, mostly plain with few architectural features and no windows.
description_view_3: A slightly angled front view, emphasizing the dome, symmetrical window arrangement, and decorative upper facade.
attribute_window_arrangement: Windows are symmetrically arranged in vertical columns on the front facade, with consistent spacing and alignment across all floors. The side and rear walls have few or no windows, emphasizing the decorative front.
